headline: PAC uncovers RM4.2 billion in unverified GLC spending
context: The Public Accounts Committee's March 2026 report revealed RM4.2 billion in GLC expenditures that could not be fully verified across Khazanah, PNB, and MARA subsidiaries.

cards.big: RM4.2 billion in GLC spending has no proper audit trail
cards.sub: PAC chair Mas Ermieyati called it the worst verification gap in a decade

cards.big: 17 Khazanah subsidiaries refused to provide full accounts to PAC
cards.sub: Companies cited commercial sensitivity despite being publicly owned entities

cards.big: Unverified expenditures equal 3% of Malaysia's 2025 federal budget
cards.sub: Money could have funded 42,000 affordable housing units at RM100,000 each

cards.big: PAC has no enforcement power to compel GLC document disclosure
cards.sub: Committee can only recommend — actual subpoena power remains with the courts

cards.big: GLCs operate in a governance blind spot — too corporate for parliament, too public for secrecy
Should GLCs face the same audit standards as federal ministries?
